creator: hrs@FreeBSD.org
text:
To get more flexibility and finer specification of dependency
	between the Canna port, ports which depend on the Canna
	library, and ones which depend on the Canna daemon and
	dictionary files, I would like to get a repo-copy of
	japanese/Canna -> japanese/canna-server and
	japanese/canna-lib.

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
